string.text: Retrieve an Artifact
Deliver the Package
Destroy the Lair
Find the Unique Item
Deal with Someone
Retrieve Mutant Parts
Defend the Stalker Squad
Report on the Task Completion
Bring the Promised Items to the Client
Barkeep
Borov
Cap from the Barrier
Major Cherepanov
General Voronin
Lance Corporal Brome
Professor Sakharov
Screw
Father Lukash
Hunter
Huntsman
Mikhalych
Baldy
Tooth
Colonel Petrenko
Cook
Duty Warrant Officer
Nimble
Bootlegger
Sidorovich
Vakhtang
Raven
Wolf
Bold
Ignat the Hunter
Sergeant Kitsenko
Pakhom
Boryan
Marked One, if you haven't realized it yet—serious business goes down in the Zone. And there is no trust in you now! No trust means no work.
Nothing right now. I am waiting on a courier... stop by in a day or two, maybe something will turn up.
And what is it you want to talk about?
Here you go... Just do not drop it! Thanks!
I have no use for cash; give it to me in goods.
I will take the cash instead; these goods are worthless.
Well then, you finished the task—you earned a reward! What is better for you, cash or goods? Take your pick...
Marked One, that is not how we do things here! Remember that!
What is it?
Look what we have today:
You're a real jackass, fo' real—I didn't send ya out for matches! Get lost, damn it... before they change your gender for ya.
I don't need ya! Papa Borov's got enough goons of his own!
What kinda business you got there, Inch... Marked One?
Alright, chill out. Take somethin' to remember Uncle Borov by...
Don't need no cash, just give me your loot...
Hell no, that's just junk ya got there, not loot! Cough up some cash...
Well, ya did me a favor... Take your pick, broski: want me to throw some dough your way, or you prefer some loot?
So what?
Damn it, you'd annoy the dead... look here:
Broski, that ain't how we do things! Remember that!
There are plenty of blabbermouths like you hanging around... Go on, get out of here and polish some mines until they shine.
I do not have time for you right now!
What do you have? Make it quick!
Well, thanks from all of us! Here, take this... it is all we have.
I have enough money... but some supplies would not go to waste.
Forget it, that stuff is just junk; we have seen better supplies than that... Cough up some cash.
Marked One, good news, nice job... What is better for you—cash or supplies?
You got something?
Anyway, there is a task if you are not too busy:
Well, you b... Fine. We will find someone else...
Stalker, Duty means responsibility! Responsibility means trust! That is what Duty has always stood for and always will! And for people like you, there is no trust...
We are managing on our own!
What business do you have with us?
Aha! Well then, take this as a token of gratitude!
I do not need money; hand over the equipment...
Forget it, that stuff is just junk, not equipment! Cough up some cash...
Sorted it out? My thanks!... Take your pick—we have money and we have equipment. What should I issue to you?
Has something been cleared up?
Anyway, there is a task:
Well, you b... Fine. We will find someone else...
That is how it works in Duty: if you take on a task—die, but get it done! You are not one of ours, of course... so stay alive, but there is no more trust in you!
There are no tasks right now.
What do you want to discuss?
Good man. Here, take this. Come by again...
Hmm... No, I do not need money; give me some gear instead...
I can buy everything I need with money! Go ahead, transfer it...
Respect! You pulled it off! What do you prefer—money or something more substantial?
The rule here is: once said, it's done! But you... *spits*...
I am listening.
There is something:
And... beat it, you... loser.
Hic... what? Ah... no, don't need anything... hic...
Uhh... a task? Which one... I don't remember a damn thing...
You actually did it, good man... well, I am keeping my end of the deal too!
Yeah, right, if that is what you call a "pile of cash"... I would rather have the equipment.
Forget it, that stuff is just junk, who would want that? Give me your pile of cash...
As they say, you can't pour "thanks" into a glass... so, take your pick—I can pour out a whole pile of cash or offer you something useful?
What? Well, at least pour me a drink...
So, what is the status of that business?
There is something:
Forgive me, but you take on tasks and fail to complete them, so we will no longer have any dealings with you!
I am sorry, there is nothing available at the moment.
Which assignment would you like to discuss?
You have handled the assignment perfectly! Allow me to present you with a reward.
I have no need for money, but material goods would be useful...
Forget it, these material goods are just junk... Transfer some money instead.
Thank you, we have been expecting you for some time... What would be better for you—a transfer to your deposit, or could we assist you with material compensation?
Now, now, my dear fellow... That is a great pity!
I am listening to you.
I can offer you the following:
I will find someone who keeps their promises...
I do not seem to need anything right now.
What? What kind of assignment do you have?
Ah! Well, thanks! Here is something from me:
I do not need money; show me the items...
Forget it, you call these items? They are junk. Cough up some cash...
Now that is the manly way—said and done! Thanks for the work... what is better for you—money or items?
Is something ready already?
Well, you are a real piece of work! And they said you were a man of your word.
I was just looking for someone:
Get lost! There will be no more work for you!
Go roll a joint and have a smoke with the guys...
What is it you want to discuss?
Sweet! Top marks to you...
I do not need money, but something useful always comes in handy...
What is so useful about this? You might as well have offered me empty tin cans! Cough up some cash...
Oh, you finally showed up... What is better for you—should I throw some cash your way or give you something useful?
It is your choice, but people like you are not liked around here!
What is it?
Look here, this is what we have:
Get out of my sight before I do something I regret. My hands are already itching; don't tempt fate.
Nothing much, really. Although... do you have any felt? I am running out of wads. No? Well, so be it.
Something must have slipped my mind... What was this about again?
Ah, that! Well, excellent—here, something from me!
I suppose that really is valuable. I do not need the money—give me the goods.
Keep your junk to yourself—I do not see anything valuable in it. Cough up some cash instead...
Well now, as they say—every beast has its own trap... I have a little bit of cash, or look here, some valuable items... what do you need more?
E-e-eh-h, who is going to do it now?
So, any success?
Yes, there is a task; it is not exactly hard work, but it is urgent:
You should just get out of here... I do not do business with tushkanos like you!
The forest provides. I am managing for now.
Be more specific.
Here you go... Just do not drop it! Thanks!
I have no use for money; give it to me in goods.
I will take the money instead; the goods are pretty worthless.
Excellent! I have something to make you happy too. What is better for you—money or some kind of trophy? I have all sorts of goods, take your pick...
Marked One, that is not how business is done! Remember that, you will stay healthier that way!
What is it?
Yes, I have some business:
Whatcha want?! There ain't no business with a loser like you... beat it while I'm still feelin' generous!
Nah, we're handlin' things ourselves, homie...
So, what's the deal?
Here ya go... just don't drop it! Thanks!
I got no use for cash, gimme the goods.
I'll take the cash instead; the goods are pretty worthless.
Well, broski, you're a stalker fo' real, not some poser! What should I cough up?.. I got some dough and some decent loot—take your pick.
Marked One, damn it... real men don't screw up like this! The Code is sacred! Remember that...
What else ya got?
Look what we got today:
What can I even trust you with? You would lose your own shoelaces...
No, there is nothing for you right now.
Be more specific.
Here, take this delivery!
I have no use for money; give it to me in goods.
I will take the money instead; your sausage is starting to make me sick.
Excellent! I have something to make you happy too. What is better for you—money or some sausage?
Why are you twitching around like a tushkano!
What is it?
Well, in principle, yes, I need this:
Look, I'm sorry, of course, but there is just no trust left for you.
Well... nobody needs anything right now. Maybe something will come up later.
Sorry, I am not following—what are you talking about?
Alright. Here, take this!
No, I do not need money. Give me that certain something of yours.
I will take the money instead; it will come in handy.
Now we are talking! Well, the loot is on me! What is better for you—money or something more substantial?
Alright, I understand. It is a dangerous business. Maybe someone else will take it on.
And what is it?
There is one urgent order. The poor souls are suffering:
What kind of business are you talking about?! How can I trust you with anything... get out of here, you oaf.
Nah, I do not need anything.
What is this about exactly?
Oh, you managed it... Open your pockets:
I do not need money; give me that... perk or whatever it is called.
Forget it, your perk is just junk. Cough up some cash...
Oh, a capable Cossack... How should I issue your bonus—give you some coins or will you take some kind of perk?
Pfft...
What is new?
There is a bit of work for a capable stalker to do:
To hell with you, Marked One... beat it, you would be better off scavenging cigarette butts.
Snag a cigarette for me from someone... no? Well fine, nothing for now then, maybe later...
Business? Hmm... let's hear it.
Excellent... Now I can rest easy! Here, take this for being a man of your word...
I do not need money, and the goods are not half bad—hand them over...
Forget it, that is just junk, not goods! Cough up some cash...
Oh, perfect timing... How can I make you happy—will you take some cash or should I throw in some goods?
Unbelievable! You can't play the game, and you can't keep your word!
What is the status of that business?
There is a delicate assignment; maybe you will take it on?
Now beat it! And be grateful you are still alive!
There is nothing at the moment.
What assignments do we have exactly?.. Go on, remind me...
Hmm... you pulled it off. Well, here is your fee!
I do not need money; hand over the property...
Forget it, that stuff is just junk, not gear! Cough up some cash...
Tough guy, respect... Take your pick—should I credit you a sum or issue some gear?
What kind of man are you anyway!.. A damn dandelion. Why did you sign up for it then?
So, what is the situation with the task?
There is something:
For YOU?! Get going, beat it...
There is nothing at the moment.
Remind me, what is it?.. We have an inspection coming up soon, my mind is on other things...
The task is complete—that is good... and I always pay my debts!
I do not need money; give me the gear...
Forget it, that is just junk, not equipment! Cough up some cash...
Thank you, I have been waiting for this... What will you choose? I can provide financial support, or we could look at some equipment.
In Duty, people like you do not last long! Remember that...
So, what is the status of the task?
There is something:
Man... you're just, like, a total fraud... I don't deal with people like you!
Uhh... just get lost...
What? What do you want, you mug?
Ah! Well, thanks... it's around here somewhere... Here!
I don't need cash, let's have a look at your goods...
Hell no, that's just junk you got there, not goods! Cough up some cash...
Oh, well look at you—you're the man, man... What should I give ya—some coupons or do ya need some goods?
What kind of man are you anyway! A damn dandelion. Why'd ya take it on then?
Well, what? What do ya want?
Listen... There's this one thing:
I have no more assignments for YOU!
We do not need anything right now.
What do you want to discuss?
Much appreciated! Thanks!
I do not need money; give it to me in items—something actually useful...
Forget it, that stuff is just junk, nothing useful about it... Cough up some cash.
There is something about you, Marked One... Thanks. Choose your compensation—here is the money, or I can issue you something useful?
Damn it. If only I had known! The whole day is wasted because of your antics.
What do you have?
Something needs to be done:
You might need another screw-up, but I do not. Get out of here, quickly.
No, nothing seems to be needed for now.
I don't follow... What are you talking about?
That is the second time you have bailed me out! Thanks! Here, take this!
Hand over your medicine; I think it will come in handy.
Money would be better; I have a few ideas...
You are a real trooper! I have a bit of cash here... or would you rather patch up your health?
Well, damn...
Ah! Damn, I completely forgot... And?
I have one request.
Beat it, man! You're not one of us, you're no man...
What?.. Yeah... I mean, no. In short, man, we'll manage somehow on our own... don't push it.
What are you talking about?
Good job, here take this. You earned it...
This currency is only good for wallpapering a toilet, give me your useful stuff...
You can never have too much money. Let's do as we agreed, transfer it.
Now you're a real man! Cool, dude! How should I show my respect—with currency or will you take some useful gear?
There! That's what happens when you rely on people like you...
What kind of business do you have?
Yeah, there's some work... take a look:
Marked One! You must have hit your head pretty hard... You were given a task and you didn't do it! How can there be any talk of trust?
I don't have any work for you right now.
A task, a task... remind me what we were talking about?
Hmm... you managed it. You honestly earned your reward!
These rubles are only good for wallpapering a toilet, give me something substantial...
You can never have too much money. Let's do as we agreed, transfer it.
I knew right away you'd go far! Handling tasks like these... even if you are from the truck, hmm... How should I thank you? Transfer some money or will you take some more substantial goods?
I never really trusted you. Not truly...
So, what about the task?
Well, there are a couple of things that need to be taken care of.
Marked One, you're as useful as a bull with milk; we are not working together anymore.
No, Marked One, we will handle the rest ourselves.
What are you saying?
You've become a real eagle! There will be a hit out on you soon... Just kidding. Look at what else I'll give you:
I won't take money; give me the goods.
Cash, cash. I really need it! So...
Good job, son! What do you want? Cash or goods?
Listen... Are you even a man? Why did you sign up for it then?
What do you want to say? Is it done?
Want to earn some? I can give you that chance. Look at what needs doing:
Marked One, there is a limit to everyone's patience, and I'm still holding mine. Beat it, quickly.
No, nothing is needed for now.
What are you talking about?
My thanks. Here, take your reward... I'll let all the stalkers know—you're a man who can be dealt with!
I won't take money; give it to me in items.
I need money, so...
Well, I guess a "thank you" won't cut it? What will you take?
A pity, brother; I guess I was wrong to think well of you.
So, how is it?
There is an order for a few things:
What is the point of giving you an assignment? You won't finish it anyway...
I usually do what I need myself...
What are you talking about?
Deal! Here, take this...
Give me some ammo. In the Zone, it is more important than money.
I can find ammo myself; I would rather have the money.
To be honest, I had my doubts about you... But I see you are a stand-up guy! How should I thank you—will you take the money or should I throw in some ammo?
Mda... Marked One... I see you are weak... in the knees.
Did you manage to deal with the mutants?
I would like to solve the monster problem quickly:
What is the point of giving you an assignment? You won't finish it anyway...
There is nothing at the moment.
What? Have you killed all the dogs already?
Here, take it; everything is fair and square with us!
I won't take money; you'd better give me something material.
I need money, so...
You've got skills! Good job! We can always use people like you in Duty! Maybe join us? No? Well, choose your reward then:
Our battalion commander was right: stalkers are scum!
So, what about the task?
There is something:
What is the point of giving you an assignment? You won't finish it anyway...
No, nothing seems to be needed for now.
What are you talking about?
Good job, Marked One! Here, take this...
Hmm... No, I do not need money; give me some gear instead...
Keep your junk to yourself—I do not see anything valuable in it. Cough up some cash instead...
Now that is the manly way—said and done! Thanks for the work... what is better for you—money or items?
What is wrong with you? Why did you take it on then? Just go...
Well, what is the word? Sergeyich is already chewing my ear off about it.
There is a task for you, stalker:
In progress...
In progress...
Professor, do not worry; it is already in the final stages.
Everything will be done. I promised, didn't I?
As soon as possible...
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
Haste is only needed in two cases: catching fleas and having diarrhea... It will all be done.
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
The work isn't going anywhere...
Haste makes waste, Nimble...
I am looking for it, don't worry...
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
Everything in its own time, Voron...
I'll just sort out my own business here and then I'll do it...
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
In progress...
You are a hunter, you should know: if you hurry, you lose the prey.
In progress...
I will deliver your package. Soon.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, do not worry.
It will be ready soon, do not worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.

It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
You're being a bit too "Nimble"...
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.

It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
Don't be in such a hurry, or you might actually make it in time...
Everything will be ready, don't worry.
It will be ready soon, don't worry.
I will deliver your package. Soon.
There are a couple of issues, but everything will be ready soon.
There are a couple of issues, but everything will be ready soon.
Be patient for a bit, Professor. It is only in your centrifuges that everything happens on its own. This is the Zone...
There are a couple of issues, but everything will be ready soon.

There are a few difficulties, but it will be ready soon.
There are a few difficulties, but it will be ready soon.
Force majeure, professor, but everything will be ready soon.
There are a few difficulties, but it will be ready soon.
Don't be in such a hurry, bro, or you might actually make it in time...

As they say, haste makes waste...
There are a few difficulties, but it will be ready soon.
Calm down. I'll deliver it soon.
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
No, nothing, I was just... thinking out loud...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
It's all under control, it'll be ready soon...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...

Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just reminding you...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Yes, everything's fine, Commander, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Get the greenbacks ready, it'll all be done soon...
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
It's nothing... I just got a bit confused, still trying to clear my head.
Everything's fine, I was just asking...
Alright. It'll be ready soon.
Just a reminder, it'll be ready soon...
Forget it... It's nothing...
Just a reminder, in case it's not needed anymore...
Just a reminder, it'll be ready soon...
Just a reminder, so you don't stiff me on the reward.
Just a reminder, it'll be ready soon...
Just a reminder, it'll be ready soon...
Just a reminder, it'll be ready soon...

Haste makes waste.
If I said I'll do it, it means soon...
If I said I'll do it, it means soon...
Stalkers keep their word; it will be ready soon...
If I said I'll do it, it means soon...
Have I ever let you down, Borov? Everything will be ready soon.

Did I say I'd do it? Then I'll do it.
If I said I'll do it, it means soon...
Boryan! I told you—everything will be ready!
I'll get it done, Sidorovich. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.
I'll get it done, Professor. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it, Commander. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.

I'll get it done, Mikhalych. Don't push it. I'm going to look around a bit.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.
I'll do it. I just need to look around first.
It's practically ready already, just wait a bit...
I'll do it. It takes a while just to reach you guys...
It's a long way, you understand.
Only cats are born quickly. Wait a bit.
Only cats are born quickly. Wait a bit.
Well, haste doesn't always lead to good results. You should know that better than anyone, Professor.
Only cats are born quickly. Wait a bit.
